name: macrodata
description: Stateful agent tools for Claude Code. Learns who you are, remembers what you're working on, schedules tasks, maintains itself.

hooks.prompt:
This session is ending. If it wasn't compacted during this session, use save_conversation_summary to capture:
- What was accomplished
- Key decisions made
- Any open threads that need follow-up

Be concise. Skip this if a compaction summary was already saved.

Context is about to be compacted. Before this happens, save what's important.

Use save_conversation_summary to capture:
- What was accomplished in this session
- Key decisions made
- Any open threads that need follow-up
- Patterns learned about the user

Be concise but thorough. This summary will help recover context in future sessions.

Additionally, if the Agent tool is available to you, run Part 2 (the background reflection worker) of the macrodata remember skill: spawn it with run_in_background true and model "sonnet" on this session's transcript, per plugins/macrodata/skills/remember/SKILL.md. If the Agent tool or the transcript path is unavailable, skip Part 2 silently — the summary above is the priority.

Context being compacted:
$ARGUMENTS
